newTests.name: no verdict yet (pending) is hidden - fail-closed
a review verdict is hidden (quarantined, not exposed)
block-list overrides official (killswitch is the top precedence)
loadTaxonomyFromDataset: 404 keeps the built-in default
fetchMcpToolsFromHF throws when the spaces listing fails
dedupToolsByName: official wins over a more-liked fork
getPublicTaxonomy strips descriptions and exposes a stable order
undefined verdict behaves the same as null (fail-closed)
a block verdict is hidden
explicit sexual term hard-blocks
ambiguous game words are NOT blocked (no false positive)
a kids app is NOT blocked by the minor-token pattern alone
the prescreen scans the README field too
mapSpaceToMcpTool builds the catalog shape with mcpUrl + flags
CSAM signal (minor token + explicit token) hard-blocks as illegal
graphic violence term hard-blocks
loadTaxonomyFromDataset: a valid file swaps the taxonomy in
fetchMcpToolsFromHF filters on the tool tag and sorts official-first
isValidSlug reflects the active taxonomy
sanitizeSlugs returns [] on garbage input
sanitizeSlugs keeps only slugs in the active taxonomy
clean app passes the prescreen (null = fall through to LLM)
verdict without a category is normalised to null
loadTaxonomyFromDataset: empty category list keeps the default
an unknown / malformed decision is treated as not-allow (hidden)
buildSpaceMcpUrl matches the HF default subdomain rule
an explicit allow verdict is visible
default taxonomy is the 9-slug v4 list with descriptions
mapSpaceToMcpTool flags blocked + missing mcp tag
buildSpaceMcpUrl is null-safe
scam pattern hard-blocks as scam_malware
sanitizeSlugs dedupes (order-preserving) and caps to 3 by default
sanitizeSlugs honours an explicit max (single-label mode)
manual block-list wins even over an allow verdict
loadTaxonomyFromDataset: malformed payload keeps the default
policy constants are well-formed
sanitizeSlugs trims + lowercases
dedupToolsByName: among non-official, oldest wins then likes
an official app is visible even with no verdict (moderation skipped)
